_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of every stage in the software project lifecycle, from initial design and build to rollout and maintenance.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI model lifecycle management, including model versioning, drift detection, performance monitoring, retraining triggers, and decommissioning criteria.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-K-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-008 (TF, cosine: 0.559), RM-K-011 (RM, cosine: 0.550).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.478). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, lifecycle]. DCWF-only terms [build, design, every, initial, maintenance, project] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, criteria, decommissioning, detection, drift, management] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.883 (P=0.892, R=0.876). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Knowledge of every stage in the software project lifecycle, from initial design" and "Knowledge of AI model lifecycle management, including model versioning, drift de" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.574 > STS 0.478 (gap +0.096). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, lifecycle] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.3%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, lifecycle]. DCWF-only: [build, design, every, initial, maintenance, project]. WIDAI-only: [ai, criteria, decommissioning, detection, drift, management].

signals.detail: STS 0.478 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
